lib.vlm.identification.is_window_vlm(peaks, window_start_idx, window_end_idx, w)[source]¶

TODO

lib.vlm.identification.take_closest(my_list, my_number, lo=0)[source]¶

Assumes my_list is sorted. Returns closest value to my_number.

If two numbers are equally close, return the smallest number.
